case_title: SULLIVAN,EILEEN VS BEKINS VAN LINES MARTIN TRANSFER & STORAGE

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,391.87 FILED BY SULLIVAN,EILEEN AS TO DEFENDANT BEKINS VAN LINES MARTIN TRANSFER & STORAGE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-23-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 00
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT BEKINS VAN LINES MARTIN TRANSFER & STORAGE HEARING SET FOR MAY-13-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SULLIVAN,EILEEN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BEKINS VAN LINES MARTIN TRANSFER & STORAGE $2,202.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,222.00, BASED ON EXCESS PRICE OVER GUARANTEED PRICE, INCL. $600 PD TO DRIVER WHO REFUSED TO DELIVER TO RES. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT BEKINS VAN LINES MARTIN TRANSFER & STORAGE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
TRIAL RESET TO APR-01-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 08 TRIAL OF MAR-23-1994 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
CERTIFIED LETTER TO BEKINS VAN LINES C/O MARTIN TRANSFER & STORAGE RETURNED SIGNED.
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF MAY-13-1994, GRANTED
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION APR-01-1994, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JUN-14-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02
